reading_lists.name: Weekend Movies
reading_lists.description: Recent PG-13 DVDs under 2.5 hours to watch over the weekend.

reading_lists.name: Climate Reads
reading_lists.description: Adult non-fiction books on climate change and the environment.

reading_lists.name: Spanish Sci-Fi Favorites
reading_lists.description: Highly rated Spanish-language science fiction novels.

saved_searches.name: New PG-13 DVDs at Main Branch

titles.title: The Future of Earth
titles.subtitle: How Climate Change Will Shape Our World
titles.description: An in-depth look at the projected impacts of climate change on global ecosystems, economies, and human societies.

titles.title: Tipping Points
titles.subtitle: On the Edge of Climate Catastrophe
titles.description: Explores the science of climate tipping points and what can still be done to avert the worst outcomes.

titles.title: The Just Transition
titles.subtitle: Climate Solutions for People and Planet
titles.description: A policy-focused examination of climate solutions that prioritize equity and justice.

titles.title: Local Actions, Global Impact
titles.subtitle: Communities Respond to Climate Change
titles.description: Case studies of communities around the world implementing local climate solutions.

titles.title: Marte Rojo
titles.subtitle: Crónicas de la Primera Colonia
titles.description: Una novela de ciencia ficción sobre la primera colonia humana en Marte y los desafíos que enfrenta.

titles.title: Estrellas Perdidas
titles.description: Una épica aventura espacial en la que una capitana debe rescatar una flota desaparecida en los bordes de la galaxia.

titles.title: La Ciudad de las Nubes
titles.description: Una distopía futurista ambientada en ciudades flotantes sobre una Tierra devastada.

titles.title: Mission to the Moon
titles.subtitle: A Space Adventure for Young Explorers
titles.description: Follow three friends as they blast off on a virtual mission to the Moon, learning science facts along the way.

titles.title: Tour of the Solar System
titles.description: An illustrated guide that takes children on a tour of all the planets and beyond.

titles.title: Galaxy Quest Club
titles.description: Members of the Galaxy Quest Club build their own backyard observatory and uncover the wonders of deep space.

titles.title: Mystery on Space Station Z
titles.description: A fast-paced mystery set on a futuristic space station, perfect for young readers.

titles.title: Space Facts 101
titles.subtitle: Fun Astronomy for Kids
titles.description: Short, engaging facts about planets, stars, and galaxies aimed at middle-grade readers.

titles.title: Time Chasers
titles.description: A PG-13 time-travel adventure where a group of teens race to fix a broken timeline.

titles.title: City of Lights and Shadows
titles.description: A noir-inspired thriller set in a futuristic mega-city.

titles.title: Stars Beyond the Veil
titles.description: An epic interstellar journey where a small crew searches for a new home for humanity.

titles.title: Hidden Truths
titles.description: A legal drama about a whistleblower uncovering corporate corruption.

titles.title: Winning Resumes
titles.subtitle: Build the Resume that Gets You Hired
titles.description: An audiobook guide to crafting effective resumes for modern job markets.

titles.title: Science Today
titles.subtitle: Special Issue: Climate Innovations
titles.description: Magazine issue focused on breakthrough technologies addressing climate change.

list_items.notes: Added from Digital Library search results.
High-level overview of future climate impacts.

rooms.name: Study Room A
rooms.notes: Small study room with whiteboard; max 2 people.

rooms.name: Study Room B
rooms.notes: Ideal for small groups; monitor with HDMI available.

rooms.name: Eastside Study Room 1
rooms.notes: Near adult stacks; suitable for quiet group study.

rooms.name: Riverside Study Room 1
rooms.notes: Overlooks the river; includes conference phone.

rooms.name: Downtown Meeting Room
rooms.notes: Projector and hybrid meeting equipment available.

events.title: Evening Resume Workshop
events.description: Learn how to structure a modern resume, highlight your strengths, and tailor your resume to specific job postings.

events.title: Create a Winning Resume
events.description: Hands-on resume-writing workshop where library staff help you craft a clear, effective resume. Bring a draft or start from scratch.

events.title: Resume Review Lab
events.description: Drop in with your current resume for one-on-one feedback. We will help you revise wording, format, and keywords.

events.title: Professional Resume Writing Intensive
events.description: A small-group intensive session focusing on transforming your resume for mid-career transitions.

events.title: Online Resume Basics
events.description: Virtual resume-writing workshop covering essential sections, formatting tips, and Applicant Tracking System (ATS) keywords.

events.title: Interview Skills for Beginners
events.description: Practice common interview questions, learn how to talk about your experience, and prepare for your next job interview.

events.title: Spring Community Job Fair
events.description: Meet local employers, learn about job openings, and attend short talks on job search strategies.

events.title: Family Storytime: Adventures in Space
events.description: Join us for songs, stories, and a simple craft all about planets and stars. Best for ages 4–8 and their caregivers.

events.title: Computer Basics for Adults
events.description: Learn how to use a mouse, create an email account, and browse the web safely.

events.title: Evening Book Club: Climate Fiction
events.description: Discuss a contemporary climate fiction novel exploring the impacts of climate change on communities.

events.title: Community Garden Planning Meeting
events.description: Help plan this year's community garden at the Riverside Branch and learn about seed starting.

events.title: Kids Space Club: Build a Solar System
events.description: Hands-on science program where kids build a scale model of the solar system to take home.

events.title: LinkedIn for Job Seekers
events.description: Learn how to create a LinkedIn profile, build your network, and search for jobs online.

events.title: Teen Resume & First Jobs Workshop
events.description: Teens will learn how to write their first resume, even with limited work experience, and practice filling out job applications.

events.title: Intro to Coding: Python Basics
events.description: An online workshop introducing the basics of Python programming. No prior coding experience required.
